'''dazupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycrozyme|mycrozyme]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycrozyme|mycrozyme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dazupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzipith|dæzipith]] || [[word:dæzipij|dæzipij]] || [[word:dæzipish|dæzipish]] || [[word:dæzipi|dæzipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazuzuputh|dazuzuputh]] || [[word:dazuzupuj|dazuzupuj]] || [[word:dazuzupush|dazuzupush]] || [[word:dazuzupu|dazuzupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazuputh|dazuputh]] || [[word:dazupuj|dazupuj]] || [[word:dazupush|dazupush]] || [[word:dazupu|dazupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazufputh|dazufputh]] || [[word:dazufpuj|dazufpuj]] || [[word:dazufpush|dazufpush]] || [[word:dazufpuf|dazufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazuputhu|dazuputhu]] || [[word:dazupuju|dazupuju]] || [[word:dazupushu|dazupushu]] || [[word:dazupuku|dazupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazuputh|dazuputh]] || [[word:dazupuj|dazupuj]] || [[word:dazupush|dazupush]] || [[word:dazupu|dazupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazuputhul|dazuputhul]] || [[word:dazupujul|dazupujul]] || [[word:dazupushul|dazupushul]] || [[word:dazupukul|dazupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazuputhuthu|dazuputhuthu]] || [[word:dazupujuju|dazupujuju]] || [[word:dazupushushu|dazupushushu]] || [[word:dazupuku|dazupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazuputhun|dazuputhun]] || [[word:dazupujun|dazupujun]] || [[word:dazupushun|dazupushun]] || [[word:dazupukun|dazupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazuputhuoro|dazuputhuoro]] || [[word:dazupujuoro|dazupujuoro]] || [[word:dazupushuoro|dazupushuoro]] || [[word:dazupukuoro|dazupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
